section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# Periodic Transaction Report — cover page

- NAME: Rohit Khanna
- OFFICE TELEPHONE: (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: (blank)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? Yes [ ] / No [X]
- Initial Report [X] / Amendment [ ]; Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- Penalty notice: "A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late."
- Stamps: HAND DELIVERED; "Page 1 of 8" (the "8" handwritten); LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER 2017 MAR 14 PM 3:14, OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES; handwritten initials "MC"; (For Official Use Only)
- Transaction grid: greyed example row (JT | Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock | Sale X | 02/05/015 | 03/07/15 | amount col B X) ignored per spec.
- First data row of the grid contains only the typed text "Please see the attached" — no boxes checked, no dates. Remaining grid rows blank.
